all.en: Last Friday, my classmates and I decided to take a short trip to Kenting.
all.zh: 上週五，我和同學們決定到墾丁來個小旅行。

all.en: We made the reservation online and chose a small bed-and-breakfast near the beach.
all.zh: 我們在網路上訂房，選了一間靠近海邊的小型民宿。

all.en: The high-speed train took us to Kaohsiung in less than two hours.
all.zh: 高鐵不到兩小時就把我們載到了高雄。

all.en: From there, we rented a car and drove south along the beautiful coast.
all.zh: 我們從那裡租了車，沿著美麗的海岸線一路往南開。

all.en: When we arrived, the owner of the B&B welcomed us with a cup of fresh fruit tea.
all.zh: 我們抵達時，民宿老闆用一杯新鮮水果茶歡迎我們。

all.en: In the afternoon, we went swimming and tried surfing for the first time.
all.zh: 下午我們去游泳，並且第一次嘗試衝浪。

all.en: The waves were stronger than I expected, but our instructor was very patient.
all.zh: 海浪比我預期的還要強勁，不過我們的教練非常有耐心。

all.en: For dinner, we walked to the famous night market to taste the local seafood.
all.zh: 晚餐我們走到有名的夜市去品嚐當地的海鮮。

all.en: I bought some small souvenirs for my parents and younger sister.
all.zh: 我買了一些小紀念品送給爸媽和妹妹。

all.en: On the second day, we visited the lighthouse and took many photos at sunrise.
all.zh: 第二天，我們參觀燈塔，並在日出時拍了許多照片。

all.en: Although the trip was short, it was the most relaxing weekend I have had this year.
all.zh: 雖然旅程很短，這卻是我今年最放鬆的一個週末。

all.en: We have already started planning our next trip to Hualien during the winter vacation.
all.zh: 我們已經開始計畫寒假時去花蓮的下一趟旅行。

all.en: During the long ride back, we listened to music and talked about our favorite moments.
all.zh: 漫長的回程路上，我們一邊聽音樂，一邊聊著最喜歡的時刻。

all.en: My classmate Anna kept showing everyone the sunset photos she had taken at the lighthouse.
all.zh: 同學安娜不停把她在燈塔拍的夕陽照片秀給大家看。

all.en: When I finally got home, my mother was waiting with a hot bowl of soup.
all.zh: 我終於回到家時，媽媽端著一碗熱湯在等我。

all.en: My little sister was so excited that she opened her souvenir before I even sat down.
all.zh: 我妹妹興奮到我都還沒坐下就把紀念品拆開了。

all.en: The next morning, I uploaded the photos to a shared album so everyone could download them.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我把照片上傳到共用相簿，這樣大家都能下載。

all.en: My teacher noticed my tanned skin in class and joked that I clearly had a good vacation.
all.zh: 上課時老師注意到我曬黑的皮膚，開玩笑說我顯然玩得很開心。

all.en: That afternoon, our group started a chat to plan the winter trip to Hualien.
all.zh: 那天下午，我們小組建了聊天群組來規劃花蓮的冬季旅行。

all.en: We decided that this time we would try cycling along the famous coastal bike path.
all.zh: 我們決定這次要嘗試沿著有名的海岸自行車道騎車。

all.en: I started saving part of my allowance every week to pay for the train tickets.
all.zh: 我開始每週存一部分零用錢來支付火車票。

all.en: Looking back at the Kenting trip, I realized that good friends make every place feel special.
all.zh: 回想墾丁這趟旅行，我體會到好朋友能讓每個地方都變得特別。

all.en: A week later, our group chat was buzzing with messages about train schedules and hotel options.
all.zh: 一週後，我們的群組訊息響個不停，討論著火車時刻和飯店的選擇。

all.en: Anna suggested we share a single document so everyone could edit the plan at the same time.
all.zh: 安娜建議我們共用一份文件，這樣大家可以同時編輯計畫。

all.en: I volunteered to compare bike rental prices and contact two shops near the Hualien station.
all.zh: 我自願比較自行車租賃的價格，並聯絡花蓮車站附近的兩間店。

all.en: My father warned me that the coastal weather could change quickly, so I packed a thin raincoat.
all.zh: 我爸爸提醒我海岸天氣變化很快，所以我特地多帶了一件薄雨衣。

all.en: My little sister begged me to bring her along, but my parents said she was still too young.
all.zh: 我妹妹求我帶她一起去，但爸媽說她年紀還太小。

all.en: To comfort her, I promised to send a daily photo and bring back a special seashell souvenir.
all.zh: 為了安慰她，我答應每天傳一張照片回家，還會帶一個特別的貝殼紀念品給她。

all.en: On the morning we left, the whole group met at the station carrying bright backpacks and helmets.
all.zh: 出發那天早上，全組人在車站集合，背著鮮豔的背包，提著安全帽。

all.en: The coastal bike path turned out to be even more beautiful than the photos we had seen online.
all.zh: 沿海自行車道實際上比我們在網路上看到的照片還要美麗。

all.en: Halfway through the ride, we stopped at a small café to share fresh pineapple juice and rest.
all.zh: 騎到一半，我們在一間小咖啡館停下來，一起分享新鮮鳳梨汁並稍作休息。

all.en: That evening, I realized our friendship had become the real reason I loved these weekend trips.
all.zh: 那天傍晚，我發覺友情才是我喜愛這些週末旅行的真正原因。

all.en: As winter approached, our group chat shifted from beach photos to packing lists and weather forecasts.
all.zh: 冬天接近時，我們的群組從海邊照片轉而討論行李清單和天氣預報。

all.en: Anna offered to bring a portable speaker so we could play music during our coastal rides.
all.zh: 安娜提議帶一個攜帶式喇叭，讓我們騎車時可以一邊聽音樂。

all.en: I booked the train tickets early and managed to secure window seats for the entire group.
all.zh: 我提早訂了火車票，還成功幫整組人都搶到了靠窗的座位。

all.en: My little sister finally accepted that she could not come, but only after I promised her two souvenirs.
all.zh: 我妹妹最後終於接受她不能去，但前提是我答應幫她帶兩個紀念品。

all.en: On the night before departure, I laid out my clothes, raincoat, and helmet beside the front door.
all.zh: 出發前一晚，我把衣服、雨衣和安全帽全擺在前門旁邊。

all.en: During the train ride, our group played a card game and almost missed the announcement for our stop.
all.zh: 火車上我們一群人玩撲克牌，差點漏聽了到站廣播。

all.en: The Hualien coastal wind was colder than expected, so we wrapped scarves over our cycling jackets.
all.zh: 花蓮海邊的風比預期還要冷，所以我們在騎車外套外面又圍上了圍巾。

all.en: Anna found a small fishing village where an old man sold us hot sweet potato soup.
all.zh: 安娜發現一個小漁村，一位老伯伯賣給我們熱騰騰的地瓜湯。

all.en: By the third day, my legs were sore, but the scenery made every kilometer feel worthwhile.
all.zh: 到第三天，我的雙腿已經痠痛，但沿途風景讓每一公里都覺得很值得。

all.en: When I returned home, my sister immediately checked my backpack for the two souvenirs I had promised.
all.zh: 回到家時，我妹妹立刻翻我的背包，找我答應她的那兩個紀念品。

all.en: She had been waiting impatiently by the door since hearing my key turn in the lock.
all.zh: 她從聽到鑰匙轉動門鎖那一刻起，就一直焦急地在門邊等著。

all.en: I gave her a tiny carved dolphin and a smooth white shell I had found near the cliffs.
all.zh: 我把一隻小小的雕花海豚和一個我在懸崖附近撿到的光滑白貝殼送給她。

all.en: She squealed with delight and immediately ran to show Mom in the kitchen.
all.zh: 她開心地尖叫，立刻跑去廚房給媽媽看。

all.en: Mom invited me to sit down and asked dozens of questions about the bike path and the weather.
all.zh: 媽媽請我坐下，問了一大堆關於自行車道和天氣的問題。

all.en: Dad reminded me to send a thank-you message to Anna for organizing the train tickets so neatly.
all.zh: 爸爸提醒我傳一則感謝訊息給安娜，謝謝她把火車票安排得這麼妥當。

all.en: After dinner, I uploaded all the cycling photos into the shared album for the whole group.
all.zh: 晚餐後，我把所有騎車的照片都上傳到全組共用的相簿裡。

all.en: Anna replied within minutes, suggesting we plan a spring trip to Taitung next year.
all.zh: 安娜幾分鐘內就回覆，提議明年春天計畫一趟台東之旅。

all.en: My sister overheard the idea and begged me to ask Mom if she could finally join us.
all.zh: 妹妹聽到這個主意，求我去問媽媽她能不能終於跟我們一起去。

all.en: That night, I lay in bed thinking about how each trip had quietly shaped my friendships.
all.zh: 那晚，我躺在床上，想著每一趟旅行如何悄悄地塑造了我的友誼。

all.en: Before falling asleep, I jotted three ideas for the Taitung trip into my old travel notebook.
all.zh: 在睡著前，我把台東之旅的三個構想寫進我那本舊旅行筆記本裡。

all.en: When the spring semester began, I noticed our group could not stop sharing photos from the two trips.
all.zh: 春季學期一開始，我就發現我們小組總是忍不住分享那兩趟旅行的照片。

all.en: Anna proposed creating a small printed photo book so each of us could keep a paper copy.
all.zh: 安娜提議製作一本小型紙本相簿，讓我們每個人都能保留一份實體的回憶。

all.en: I offered to design the cover using my favorite sunset photo from the Hualien coastal ride.
all.zh: 我自願用我最喜歡的花蓮海岸騎車夕陽照來設計封面。

all.en: My little sister carefully chose her two favorite pictures and insisted they appear on the first page.
all.zh: 妹妹小心翼翼地挑出她最喜歡的兩張照片，堅持要把它們放在第一頁。

all.en: Mom suggested adding short captions in both Chinese and English to make the book even more meaningful.
all.zh: 媽媽建議在每張照片旁加上中英文短說明，讓相簿更有意義。

all.en: Dad quietly slipped me extra money to print one bonus copy for our friendly Kenting B&B owner.
all.zh: 爸爸悄悄塞錢給我，要我多印一本送給那位親切的墾丁民宿老闆。

all.en: Two weeks later, the finished photo books arrived, glossy and heavier than any of us had expected.
all.zh: 兩週後，完成的相簿送到了，光滑的封面比我們所有人預期的都要厚重。

all.en: We gathered at school to flip through the pages, laughing at forgotten details on almost every photo.
all.zh: 我們在學校裡聚在一起翻閱，每張照片裡幾乎都有被遺忘的細節讓大家忍不住大笑。

all.en: Anna mailed one copy to the Kenting owner, who replied with a long thank-you letter and dried fruits.
all.zh: 安娜寄了一本給墾丁老闆，老闆回了一封長長的感謝信，還附上一些果乾。

all.en: I tucked my own copy onto the shelf above my desk, ready to inspire every future trip we planned.
all.zh: 我把自己的那本放到書桌上方的書架上，準備為我們未來每一趟旅行帶來靈感。

all.en: On a quiet Sunday, I opened the photo book again and started sketching ideas for the Taitung itinerary.
all.zh: 某個安靜的星期天，我再次翻開相簿，開始為台東行程草擬構想。

all.en: My little sister insisted on packing her own sunscreen this time, claiming she had finally learned from last summer's sunburn.
all.zh: 妹妹這次堅持要自己帶防曬乳，宣稱她終於從去年夏天那場曬傷學到了教訓。

all.en: We argued for half an hour over whether to bring the portable speaker, because Anna's batteries kept running out at the worst moments.
all.zh: 我們為了要不要帶攜帶式喇叭爭了半個小時，因為安娜的電池總是在最掃興的時候沒電。

all.en: Dad slipped a small first aid kit into my backpack without saying anything, and I found it only after the train left the station.
all.zh: 爸爸不聲不響地把一個小急救包塞進我背包，我直到火車離站後才發現。

all.en: On the balloon platform, my sister gripped the safety rail so tightly that her knuckles turned white the whole way up.
all.zh: 在熱氣球平台上，妹妹一路上把安全欄杆抓得指節發白。

all.en: Anna whispered that she was actually a little scared of heights, but she did not want to admit it in front of the younger kids.
all.zh: 安娜悄悄說她其實有點怕高，但不想在小朋友面前承認。

all.en: We ate hot bowls of millet porridge at a tiny shop run by an old auntie who kept refilling our cups without asking.
all.zh: 我們在一間小店吃熱呼呼的小米粥，老闆娘不問就一直幫我們續杯。

all.en: On the last night, my sister fell asleep on my shoulder during the bus ride back, still clutching her balloon ticket stub.
all.zh: 最後一晚回程的巴士上，妹妹靠在我肩膀睡著了，手裡還緊緊握著熱氣球的票根。

all.en: Mom said the souvenirs we brought back this time were more thoughtful, because we had finally learned what each family member actually used.
all.zh: 媽媽說我們這次帶回的紀念品更貼心，因為我們終於弄清楚每位家人實際上會用什麼。

all.en: Before I turned off the lamp, I added one more line to my notebook: travel is most fun when you bring the right people along.
all.zh: 關燈之前，我在筆記本上又加了一句：旅行最有趣的，是和對的人一起出發。

all.en: Anna shared a list of hot spring hotels she had found through her cousin who lived in Taitung.
all.zh: 安娜分享了一份溫泉飯店清單，是她那位住在台東的表姊幫忙找的。

all.en: We agreed that this time the trip would include a hot air balloon ride at Luye Highland.
all.zh: 我們同意這次旅行要安排在鹿野高台搭乘熱氣球。

all.en: My little sister was finally given permission to come, on the condition that she would behave well.
all.zh: 妹妹終於獲准同行，條件是她必須乖乖聽話。

all.en: She practiced packing her own small suitcase every weekend to prove she was ready for the trip.
all.zh: 她每個週末都練習自己整理小行李箱，證明自己已經準備好出發了。

all.en: Mom helped her label each item so nothing important would be left behind at the hotel.
all.zh: 媽媽幫她在每件物品上貼標籤，這樣才不會把重要東西遺忘在飯店裡。

all.en: Dad checked the train schedule twice and insisted on driving us to the station before sunrise.
all.zh: 爸爸把火車時刻表查了兩次，堅持要在日出前開車送我們到車站。

all.en: When the balloon lifted off, my sister grabbed my hand and her eyes grew wide with wonder.
all.zh: 熱氣球升空時，妹妹緊緊抓住我的手，雙眼睜得大大的，充滿驚奇。

all.en: Anna captured the perfect photo of our group floating above the green valley at golden hour.
all.zh: 安娜在金色時刻拍下了我們一群人飄浮在綠色山谷上空的完美照片。

all.en: Back home, I added a fresh chapter to the photo book and titled it Three Trips, One Family.
all.zh: 回到家後，我在相簿裡加了新一章，並把標題寫成「三趟旅行，一個大家庭」。

all.en: The next morning, my sister asked when we could plan another trip to somewhere new together.
all.zh: 隔天早上，妹妹問我們什麼時候可以再一起計畫去新的地方旅行。

all.en: I told her good travel ideas need patience, so we should first finish the current school term.
all.zh: 我告訴她，好的旅行構想需要耐心，所以我們應該先把這學期讀完。

all.en: Anna suggested that our group try a short cultural trip to Lukang during the autumn holidays.
all.zh: 安娜建議我們小組在秋假時來一趟短程的鹿港文化之旅。

all.en: Mom liked the idea because she had visited Lukang as a young woman and loved the old streets.
all.zh: 媽媽很喜歡這個主意，因為她年輕時去過鹿港，非常喜歡那裡的老街。

all.en: Dad agreed to let my sister join again, since she had behaved so well during the Taitung trip.
all.zh: 爸爸同意讓妹妹再次參加，因為她在台東旅行時表現得非常好。

all.en: I started reading articles about traditional crafts and temple festivals in the historic harbor town.
all.zh: 我開始閱讀有關這座歷史海港小鎮的傳統工藝和廟會的文章。

all.en: Anna offered to interview her grandmother, who had grown up only one street from the old temple.
all.zh: 安娜自願去訪問她的祖母，因為祖母小時候就住在離老廟只隔一條街的地方。

all.en: My little sister practiced writing a short travel diary so she could record her own memories.
all.zh: 妹妹練習寫一本簡短的旅行日記，這樣她也能記下屬於自己的回憶。

all.en: When the booking was finally confirmed, we cheered loudly enough that the neighbors knocked on our wall.
all.zh: 訂房終於確認時，我們歡呼得太大聲，連鄰居都來敲我們的牆壁。

all.en: That night, I added a new title page to the photo book, leaving space for our Lukang chapter.
all.zh: 那晚，我在相簿裡加了一頁新的標題頁，留下空間給未來的鹿港篇章。
